subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! I bear witness unto that which the Tongue of Thy Grandeur hath testified before the appearance of Thy creation - that verily Thou art God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی اشهد بما شهد لسان عظمتک قبل ظهور خلقک انک انت الله لا
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @absolute freedom; independence of God, @prayer for victory and requital; triumph of the Cause, @chastisement and requital
